meta.title: My learning — ClassAuto
meta.description: Streak, watch stats, certificates and encouragement, all in one place. No advertising, auto-deletion after graduation.

profileHub.loadError: Could not load full learning data — some endpoints are still in development.

privacy.heading: Your data is safe
privacy.bullet1: Your watch and Q&A history is visible only to the instructor of each lecture.
privacy.bullet2: No data is used for advertising or shared with third parties for marketing.
privacy.bullet3: Personally identifiable data is auto-deleted after the post-graduation retention window.
privacy.moreLink: Read the student data protection policy

certificates.title: Completion certificates
certificates.subtitle: PDF certificate is issued for lectures you've watched and passed.
certificates.shareCopyError: Couldn't copy — your browser may be blocking clipboard access.
certificates.backendPending: PDF download and share link will be enabled once the backend endpoint ships.

encouragements.title: Encouragement received
encouragements.subtitle: Auto-encouragement messages from instructors accumulate here.

questionsRecent.title: Recent questions
questionsRecent.subtitle: Logs of questions answered with course-material RAG.

celebration.title: Congratulations, {name}!
celebration.body: You've completed {course}. A certificate has been issued.

panel.title: Accessibility
panel.subtitle: Settings apply to your view only and last for the current session.
panel.highContrastHint: Increase contrast between text and background.
panel.footerNote: These settings stay on your device per the student data protection policy.
panel.shortcutsHint: Press ? to open the shortcut help.

shortcutsModal.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcutsModal.subtitle: Available on the lecture viewer.
shortcutsModal.footerNote: Shortcuts are disabled while typing into Q&A or another input.
